category_sources: current_curation.category_path is networking; source_facts.description identifies a loop-avoiding distance-vector routing protocol
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is babeld; official Babel page names babeld as the reference implementation
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Babel project page with source, readings, RFCs, FAQ, and babeld manual links
repo_sources: Official Babel page provides the git clone URL for github.com/jech/babeld.git
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies routing protocol; official Babel page describes IPv4/IPv6 routing, wireless mesh support, and babeld implementation
